mapper.select: SELECT T.*, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.SEXCODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SEX_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.NATIONALITY_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS NATIONALITY_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS MARITAL_STATUS_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.EMP_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS EMP_TYPE_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.JOIN_TYPE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS JOIN_TYPE_NAME FROM HR_EMPLOYEE_RECRUIT T WHERE T.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
SELECT HR_PERSON_ID_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO HR_EMPLOYEE_RECRUIT ( PERSON_ID, CPNY_ID, DEPTNO, EMPID, LOCAL_NAME, CHINESE_PINYIN, ENGLISH_NAME, KOREAN_NAME, SEXCODE, DOB, NATIONALITY_CODE, NATION_CODE, MARITAL_STATUS_CODE, STANDARD_POSITION, POST_FAMILY, POST_GRADE_NO, POSITION_NO, WORK_AREA, EMP_TYPE_CODE, EMP_COMMON_TYPE_CODE, JOIN_TYPE, JOIN_DETAIL_TYPE, DATE_STARTED, CONFIRM_WORK_DATE, IS_PROBATION, END_PROBATION_DATE, CONTRACT_START_DATE, CONTRACT_END_DATE, TIME_STARTED, MAIN_BUSINESS, RANK_STATISTICS, PRODUCT_TYPE, COST_CENTER, COIN_CODE, HOME_PHONE, COMPANY_PHONE, OFFICE_PHONE, EMAIL, IDCARD_NO, DOCUMENT_TYPE, IDCARD_START_DATE, ISSUING_AUTHORITY, ADDRESS_TYPE, EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, ADDRESS_CONTENT, HUJIADDRESS_TYPE, HUJIYOUXIAO_START_DATE, HUJIADDRESS_CONTENT, NATIONALITY, INSURANCE_TYPE, INSURANCE_AREA, INSURANCE_DISTINGUISH, JINGSHEBAO, WAGE_TYPE, ACCOUNT_NO, OLD_PAY, EXPERIENCE, RECRUIT_TYPE, RECOMMEND, REMARK, ACTIVITY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP ) VALUES ( #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{localName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{chinesePinyin, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{englishName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{koreanName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sexcode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dob, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nationalityCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maritalStatusCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{standardPosition, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postFamily, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postGradeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{positionNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workArea, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{empTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{empCommonTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{joinType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{joinDetailType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dateStarted, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confirmWorkDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isProbation, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endProbationDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contractStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contractEndDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{timeStarted, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mainBusiness, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rankStatistics, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costCenter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{coinCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{homePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{officePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idcardNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{documentType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idcardStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{issuingAuthority, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addressType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{effectiveStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addressContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hujiaddressType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hujiyouxiaoStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hujiaddressContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nationality, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{insuranceType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{insuranceArea, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{insuranceDistinguish, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jingshebao, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wageType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oldPay, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{experience, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{recruitType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{recommend, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0', SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE HR_EMPLOYEE_RECRUIT SET DEPTNO = #{deptNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EMPID = #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LOCAL_NAME = #{localName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHINESE_PINYIN = #{chinesePinyin, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ENGLISH_NAME = #{englishName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, KOREAN_NAME = #{koreanName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SEXCODE = #{sexcode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DOB = #{dob, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NATIONALITY_CODE = #{nationalityCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NATION_CODE = #{nationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MARITAL_STATUS_CODE = #{maritalStatusCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STANDARD_POSITION = #{standardPosition, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POST_FAMILY = #{postFamily, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POST_GRADE_NO = #{postGradeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POSITION_NO = #{positionNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_AREA = #{workArea, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EMP_TYPE_CODE = #{empTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EMP_COMMON_TYPE_CODE = #{empCommonTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JOIN_TYPE = #{joinType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JOIN_DETAIL_TYPE = #{joinDetailType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATE_STARTED = #{dateStarted, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONFIRM_WORK_DATE = #{confirmWorkDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_PROBATION = #{isProbation, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, END_PROBATION_DATE = #{endProbationDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONTRACT_START_DATE = #{contractStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONTRACT_END_DATE = #{contractEndDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TIME_STARTED = #{timeStarted, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAIN_BUSINESS = #{mainBusiness, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RANK_STATISTICS = #{rankStatistics, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRODUCT_TYPE = #{productType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COST_CENTER = #{costCenter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COIN_CODE = #{coinCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HOME_PHONE = #{homePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_PHONE = #{companyPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OFFICE_PHONE = #{officePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EMAIL = #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IDCARD_NO = #{idcardNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DOCUMENT_TYPE = #{documentType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IDCARD_START_DATE = #{idcardStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISSUING_AUTHORITY = #{issuingAuthority, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADDRESS_TYPE = #{addressType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EFFECTIVE_START_DATE = #{effectiveStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADDRESS_CONTENT = #{addressContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HUJIADDRESS_TYPE = #{hujiaddressType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HUJIYOUXIAO_START_DATE = #{hujiyouxiaoStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HUJIADDRESS_CONTENT = #{hujiaddressContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NATIONALITY = #{nationality, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INSURANCE_TYPE = #{insuranceType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INSURANCE_AREA = #{insuranceArea, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INSURANCE_DISTINGUISH = #{insuranceDistinguish, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JINGSHEBAO = #{jingshebao, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WAGE_TYPE = #{wageType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ACCOUNT_NO = #{accountNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OLD_PAY = #{oldPay, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXPERIENCE = #{experience, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RECRUIT_TYPE = #{recruitType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RECOMMEND = #{recommend, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT E.SEQ, E.PERSON_ID, E.DEGREE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(E.DEGREE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEGREE_NAME, E.FINAL_DEGREE_WHETHER, E.DEGREES_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(E.DEGREES_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEGREES_NAME, E.INSTITUTION_NAME, E.SUBJECT, E.START_DATE, E.END_DATE, E.SCHOOL_LENGTH, E.THESIS_NAME_LOCAL, E.THESIS_NAME_ENG, E.SUBJECT_SECOND, E.EDU_DEG_NUM, E.SITE_COUNTRY, E.EXPERIENCE_STUDY_ABROAD, E.ADDRESS, E.REMARK, E.ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(E.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CREATE_DATE, E.CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(E.UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS UPDATE_DATE, E.UPDATED_BY FROM HR_EDUCATION_RECRUIT E WHERE E.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND E.ACTIVITY = '1' ORDER BY E.ORDERNO, E.SEQ
SELECT * FROM HR_EDUCATION_RECRUIT WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.insert:
SELECT HR_EDU_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO HR_EDUCATION_RECRUIT ( SEQ, PERSON_ID, DEGREE_CODE, FINAL_DEGREE_WHETHER, DEGREES_CODE, INSTITUTION_NAME, SUBJECT, START_DATE, END_DATE, SCHOOL_LENGTH, THESIS_NAME_LOCAL, THESIS_NAME_ENG, SUBJECT_SECOND, EDU_DEG_NUM, SITE_COUNTRY, EXPERIENCE_STUDY_ABROAD, ADDRESS, REMARK, ACTIVITY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP ) VALUES ( #{seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{degreeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{finalDegreeWhether, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{degreesCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{institutionName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subject, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{schoolLength, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thesisNameLocal, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thesisNameEng, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subjectSecond, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eduDegNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{siteCountry, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{experienceStudyAbroad, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '1', SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE HR_EDUCATION_RECRUIT SET DEGREE_CODE = #{degreeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FINAL_DEGREE_WHETHER = #{finalDegreeWhether, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEGREES_CODE = #{degreesCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INSTITUTION_NAME = #{institutionName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SUBJECT = #{subject, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_DATE = #{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, END_DATE = #{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SCHOOL_LENGTH = #{schoolLength, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, THESIS_NAME_LOCAL = #{thesisNameLocal, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, THESIS_NAME_ENG = #{thesisNameEng, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SUBJECT_SECOND = #{subjectSecond, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EDU_DEG_NUM = #{eduDegNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SITE_COUNTRY = #{siteCountry, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXPERIENCE_STUDY_ABROAD = #{experienceStudyAbroad, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADDRESS = #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
UPDATE HR_EDUCATION_RECRUIT SET ACTIVITY = '0' WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT W.SEQ, W.PERSON_ID, W.CPNY_NAME, W.DEPT_NAME, W.START_DATE, W.END_DATE, W.POSITION, W.POSITION_ENG, W.PAYROLL, W.REMARK, W.LEFT_REASON, W.CONTACT_PHONE, W.WITNESS, W.CPNY_ADDRESS, W.DUTY, W.ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(W.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CREATE_DATE, W.CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(W.UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS UPDATE_DATE, W.UPDATED_BY FROM HR_WORK_EXPERIENCE_RECRUIT W WHERE W.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND W.ACTIVITY = '1' ORDER BY W.ORDERNO, W.SEQ
SELECT * FROM HR_WORK_EXPERIENCE_RECRUIT WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.insert:
SELECT HR_W_EXP_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO HR_WORK_EXPERIENCE_RECRUIT ( SEQ, PERSON_ID, CPNY_NAME, DEPT_NAME, START_DATE, END_DATE, POSITION, POSITION_ENG, PAYROLL, REMARK, LEFT_REASON, CONTACT_PHONE, WITNESS, CPNY_ADDRESS, DUTY, ACTIVITY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP ) VALUES ( #{seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{position, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{positionEng, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payroll, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leftReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contactPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{witness, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{duty, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '1', SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE HR_WORK_EXPERIENCE_RECRUIT SET CPNY_NAME = #{cpnyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPT_NAME = #{deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_DATE = #{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, END_DATE = #{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POSITION = #{position, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POSITION_ENG = #{positionEng, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYROLL = #{payroll, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LEFT_REASON = #{leftReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONTACT_PHONE = #{contactPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WITNESS = #{witness, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CPNY_ADDRESS = #{cpnyAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DUTY = #{duty, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
UPDATE HR_WORK_EXPERIENCE_RECRUIT SET ACTIVITY = '0' WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT F.SEQ, F.PERSON_ID, F.FAM_NAME, F.FAM_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(F.FAM_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS FAM_TYPE_NAME, F.GENDER, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(F.GENDER, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS GENDER_NAME, F.FAM_BORNDATE, F.EMERGENCY_CONTACT_YN, F.FAM_ADDRESS, F.FAM_FAMILY_PHONE, F.FAM_EMAIL, F.FAM_PHONE, F.WORK_PHONE, F.WELFARE_TYPE, F.REMARK, F.CHILDREN_CODE, F.OCCUPATION, F.COUNTRY, F.DIPLOMA, F.WORK_UNIT, F.AGE, F.ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(F.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS CREATE_DATE, F.CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(F.UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS UPDATE_DATE, F.UPDATED_BY FROM HR_FAMILY_RECRUIT F WHERE F.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND F.ACTIVITY = '1' ORDER BY F.ORDERNO, F.SEQ
SELECT * FROM HR_FAMILY_RECRUIT WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.insert:
SELECT HR_FAMILY_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO HR_FAMILY_RECRUIT ( SEQ, PERSON_ID, FAM_NAME, FAM_TYPE_CODE, GENDER, FAM_BORNDATE, EMERGENCY_CONTACT_YN, FAM_ADDRESS, FAM_FAMILY_PHONE, FAM_EMAIL, FAM_PHONE, WORK_PHONE, WELFARE_TYPE, REMARK, CHILDREN_CODE, OCCUPATION, COUNTRY, DIPLOMA, WORK_UNIT, AGE, ACTIVITY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP ) VALUES ( #{seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{famName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{famTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{famBorndate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emergencyContactYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{famAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{famFamilyPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{famEmail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{famPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{welfareType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{childrenCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{occupation, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{country, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{diploma, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workUnit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{age, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '1', SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE HR_FAMILY_RECRUIT SET FAM_NAME = #{famName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FAM_TYPE_CODE = #{famTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GENDER = #{gender, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FAM_BORNDATE = #{famBorndate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EMERGENCY_CONTACT_YN = #{emergencyContactYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FAM_ADDRESS = #{famAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FAM_FAMILY_PHONE = #{famFamilyPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FAM_EMAIL = #{famEmail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FAM_PHONE = #{famPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_PHONE = #{workPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WELFARE_TYPE = #{welfareType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHILDREN_CODE = #{childrenCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OCCUPATION = #{occupation, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COUNTRY = #{country, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DIPLOMA = #{diploma, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_UNIT = #{workUnit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AGE = #{age, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
UPDATE HR_FAMILY_RECRUIT SET ACTIVITY = '0' WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT SEQ, REGISTER_DATE, REMARK, REGISTER_INFO, REGISTER_CODE, ACTIVITY FROM HR_RECRUIT_REGISTER_INFO WHERE REGISTER_TYPE = '80000057' AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (ACTIVITY IS NULL OR ACTIVITY != '2') ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SEQ) DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT TO_CHAR(HR_RECRUIT_REGISTER_INFO_SEQ.NEXTVAL) FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO HR_RECRUIT_REGISTER_INFO ( SEQ, REGISTER_TYPE, REGISTER_DATE, CPNY_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP, ACTIVITY, REMARK ) VALUES ( #{registerSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '80000057', #{registerDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0', #{registerRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RN, A.* FROM ( SELECT T.SEQ, T.REGISTER_SEQ, T.EMPID, T.LOCAL_NAME, T.START_DATE, T.TRANS_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.TRANS_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS TRANS_CODE_NAME, T.TRANS_REASON, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.TRANS_REASON, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS TRANS_REASON_NAME, T.DEPTNO, GET_DEPT_NAME(T.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME, T.POST_FAMILY, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.POST_FAMILY, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_FAMILY_NAME, T.NEW_POST_GRADE_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.NEW_POST_GRADE_NO,#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NAME, T.POSITION_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.POSITION_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POSITION_NO_NAME, T.EMP_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.EMP_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS EMP_TYPE_NAME, T.MAIN_BUSINESS, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.MAIN_BUSINESS, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS MAIN_BUSINESS_NAME, T.COST_CENTER, T.REMARKS, T.ACTIVITY, T.LINE_ID FROM HR_EXPERIENCE_INSIDE_BATCH T WHERE T.REGISTER_SEQ = #{registerSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (T.ACTIVITY IS NULL OR T.ACTIVITY != 2) ORDER BY T.LINE_ID ASC NULLS LAST, T.SEQ ASC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{start, jdbcType=NUMERIC} + #{length, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) WHERE RN > #{start, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.insert:
SELECT TO_CHAR(HR_EXPERIENCE_INSIDE_BATCH_SEQ.NEXTVAL) FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO HR_EXPERIENCE_INSIDE_BATCH ( SEQ, REGISTER_SEQ, CPNY_ID, EMPID, LOCAL_NAME, START_DATE, TRANS_CODE, TRANS_REASON, DEPTNO, POST_FAMILY, NEW_POST_GRADE_NO, POSITION_NO, EMP_TYPE_CODE, MAIN_BUSINESS, COST_CENTER, REMARKS, LINE_ID, ACTIVITY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP ) VALUES ( #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{registerSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{localName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postFamily, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{newPostGradeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{positionNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{empTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mainBusiness, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costCenter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lineId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE HR_EXPERIENCE_INSIDE_BATCH SET START_DATE = #{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRANS_CODE = #{transCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRANS_REASON = #{transReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPTNO = #{deptno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POST_FAMILY = #{postFamily, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NEW_POST_GRADE_NO = #{newPostGradeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POSITION_NO = #{positionNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EMP_TYPE_CODE = #{empTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAIN_BUSINESS = #{mainBusiness, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COST_CENTER = #{costCenter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARKS = #{remarks, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT SEQ, REGISTER_DATE, REMARK, ACTIVITY FROM HR_RECRUIT_REGISTER_INFO WHERE REGISTER_TYPE = '14014410' AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (ACTIVITY IS NULL OR ACTIVITY != '2') ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SEQ) DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT TO_CHAR(HR_RECRUIT_REGISTER_INFO_SEQ.NEXTVAL) FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO HR_RECRUIT_REGISTER_INFO ( SEQ, REGISTER_TYPE, REGISTER_DATE, CPNY_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP, ACTIVITY, REMARK ) VALUES ( #{registerSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '14014410', #{registerDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0', #{registerRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RN, A.* FROM ( SELECT T.SEQ, T.REGISTER_SEQ, T.EMPID, T.VIETNAM_NAME, T.ENGLISH_NAME, T.DOB, T.DATE_STARTED, T.END_PROBATION_DATE, T.JOIN_TYPE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.JOIN_TYPE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS JOIN_TYPE_NAME, T.JOIN_DETAIL_TYPE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.JOIN_DETAIL_TYPE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS JOIN_DETAIL_NAME, T.DEPTNO, GET_DEPT_NAME(T.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME, T.POST_GRADE_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NAME, T.MAIN_BUSINESS, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.MAIN_BUSINESS, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS MAIN_BUSINESS_NAME, T.POST_FAMILY, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.POST_FAMILY, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_FAMILY_NAME, T.EMP_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.EMP_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS EMP_TYPE_NAME, T.POSITION_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.POSITION_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POSITION_NO_NAME, T.COST_CENTER, T.FINAL_DEGREE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.FINAL_DEGREE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS FINAL_DEGREE_NAME, T.SEXCODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.SEXCODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SEX_NAME, T.END_DATE, T.INSTITUTION_NAME, T.SUBJECT_NAME, T.IDCARD_NO, T.IDCARD_S_DATE, T.ISSUING_AUTHORITY, T.NATIONALITY_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.NATIONALITY_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS NATIONALITY_NAME, T.NATION_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.NATION_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS NATION_NAME, T.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS MARITAL_STATUS_NAME, T.EMAIL_SECOND, T.HOME_PHONE, T.TELEPHONE, T.ADDRESS_CONTENT, T.REG_PLACE, T.ACTIVITY, T.LINE_ID, T.PERSON_ID FROM HR_EMPLOYEE_RECRUIT_BATCH T WHERE T.REGISTER_SEQ = #{registerSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (T.ACTIVITY IS NULL OR T.ACTIVITY != 2) ORDER BY T.LINE_ID ASC NULLS LAST, T.SEQ ASC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{start, jdbcType=NUMERIC} + #{length, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) WHERE RN > #{start, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.insert:
SELECT TO_CHAR(HR_EMPLOYEE_RECRUIT_BATCH_SEQ.NEXTVAL) FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO HR_EMPLOYEE_RECRUIT_BATCH ( SEQ, PERSON_ID, REGISTER_SEQ, CPNY_ID, EMPID, VIETNAM_NAME, ENGLISH_NAME, DOB, DATE_STARTED, END_PROBATION_DATE, JOIN_TYPE, JOIN_DETAIL_TYPE, DEPTNO, POST_GRADE_NO, MAIN_BUSINESS, POST_FAMILY, EMP_TYPE_CODE, POSITION_NO, COST_CENTER, FINAL_DEGREE_CODE, END_DATE, INSTITUTION_NAME, SUBJECT_NAME, IDCARD_NO, IDCARD_S_DATE, ISSUING_AUTHORITY, SEXCODE, NATIONALITY_CODE, NATION_CODE, MARITAL_STATUS_CODE, EMAIL_SECOND, HOME_PHONE, TELEPHONE, ADDRESS_CONTENT, REG_PLACE, LINE_ID, ACTIVITY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP ) VALUES ( #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HR_PERSON_ID_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{registerSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vietnamName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{englishName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dob, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dateStarted, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endProbationDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{joinType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{joinDetailType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postGradeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mainBusiness, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postFamily, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{empTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{positionNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costCenter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{finalDegreeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{institutionName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subjectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idcardNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idcardSDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{issuingAuthority, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sexcode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nationalityCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maritalStatusCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emailSecond, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{homePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{telephone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addressContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regPlace, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lineId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE HR_EMPLOYEE_RECRUIT_BATCH SET VIETNAM_NAME = #{vietnamName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ENGLISH_NAME = #{englishName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DOB = #{dob, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATE_STARTED = #{dateStarted, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, END_PROBATION_DATE = #{endProbationDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JOIN_TYPE = #{joinType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JOIN_DETAIL_TYPE = #{joinDetailType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPTNO = #{deptno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POST_GRADE_NO = #{postGradeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAIN_BUSINESS = #{mainBusiness, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POST_FAMILY = #{postFamily, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EMP_TYPE_CODE = #{empTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POSITION_NO = #{positionNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COST_CENTER = #{costCenter, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SEXCODE = #{sexcode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NATIONALITY_CODE = #{nationalityCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NATION_CODE = #{nationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MARITAL_STATUS_CODE= #{maritalStatusCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FINAL_DEGREE_CODE = #{finalDegreeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, END_DATE = #{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INSTITUTION_NAME = #{institutionName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SUBJECT_NAME = #{subjectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IDCARD_NO = #{idcardNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IDCARD_S_DATE = #{idcardSDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISSUING_AUTHORITY = #{issuingAuthority, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EMAIL_SECOND = #{emailSecond, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HOME_PHONE = #{homePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TELEPHONE = #{telephone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADDRESS_CONTENT = #{addressContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_PLACE = #{regPlace, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT EMPID, LOCAL_NAME, DEPTNO, POST_FAMILY, POST_GRADE_NO AS NEW_POST_GRADE_NO, POSITION_NO, EMP_TYPE_CODE, MAIN_BUSINESS, COST_CENTER FROM HR_EMPLOYEE WHERE EMPID = #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ROWNUM = 1
